name: Skill Usage Audit
description: Writes tool and skill usage telemetry to SQLite for audit and self-improving skill lifecycle.

dbPath.description: SQLite database path for canonical telemetry. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/audits/skill-usage.db

includeToolParams.description: Whether to include tool params in tool_call_start/end events

captureMessageContent.description: When true, store message text snapshots; when false, store only metadata + labels for privacy

redactKeys.description: List of param keys to redact in tool event payloads

skillBlockDetection.description: Whether to emit skill_block_detected events from before_prompt_build

contextWindowSize.description: Number of messages to retain before/after a skill read for execution context capture

contextTimeoutMs.description: Max milliseconds to wait for follow-up messages before finalizing a skill execution record
